title: Nojiko and Genzo Struggle Above
description: On pages 14–17, nojiko and genzo struggle above focuses on Luffy, Sanji, Kuroobi, Nojiko as luffy becomes trapped in the sea, forcing Sanji and the others to split their attention between saving him and winning the fight.
scene: On pages 14–17, nojiko and genzo struggle above focuses on Luffy, Sanji, Kuroobi, Nojiko as luffy becomes trapped in the sea, forcing Sanji and the others to split their attention between saving him and winning the fight.

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: But behold! This is the extent of your chivalry!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Try to escape as you will,

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: But this game will end with your death.

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: And once this game ends, I'll kill that villages,

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: which will kill off that rubber boy at the same time as well.

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: And then I'll kill that long-nosed man, Zoro, and all those villagers who tried to rebel!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: And of course, we won't let Nami get off Scott-free after betraying our trust.

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Do you under- stand...?

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Despite all your lip-service for your precious ideal called chivalry...

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: You CANNOT EVEN SAVE ONE PERSON!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: How powerless you humans are...

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: You can't even handle a sudden change in water pressure...!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: In other words, if I were to drag you down to the ocean floor in an instant,

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Your inner organs will burst open!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Fatal pressure plunge!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: This calls for a change of plans.

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: I'll leave Lifey to that man for now.

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Cave

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: I swear I won't let him win!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: He thinks that I can't even save one person!?

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Brother Cook's not coming up...

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: And neither are that man and Nami's sister... just what's going on down there...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: This man still won't die...!?

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Fine, I shall do it once more!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: These Fishmen...

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: On land, they breathe using things but underwater, they breathe using gills...I which would mean that they're nothing but talking fish!!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: We're back up again. I wonder if you can handle a second ride?

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Bite!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: And if it's a fish we're talking about, all you have to do is block their gills and they'll die!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: GUBAHHHHHH!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: If you're a fish, you should be feeling the same pain!

summary: This part pushes the Arlong Park battle forward, clarifying who is fighting, what is at stake, and why Nami’s freedom matters.
